profile: Sanctuary Assassin, Physical Counterattack. His Ultimate is a passive that replaces Basic Attack with [Divine Spear Verdict] and re-casts it as a counterattack whenever an ally is attacked (Awaken raises the trigger count to 5), so his entire damage output is a high-volume stream of basic-attack/counter hits. Every attack/counter grants [Momentum] (ramping self ATK + Lifesteal over turns) and stacks [Quash]; attacking [Quash] targets adds 25% ATK x stacks and a guaranteed +30% Crit Rate, so he crits hard and kills repeatedly. He WANTS basic-attack DMG, crit, on-kill re-attacks, True DMG and Final DMG riders on attacks, and ATK%/ramp; he does NOT want ultimate-only, AoE-skill-only, heal-output, control, effect-hit, or pure-tank effects.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: His own mirror and the canonical breakpoint case: stacking Basic Attack DMG (up to 25%/40%) on every counter/basic attack, which is literally all he does. B-tier stat-stick at 0-2; S-tier at 3+ where 'when killing an enemy, 40%/60%/80% chance to launch a Basic Attack against a random enemy' chains into his kill-heavy volume playstyle.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Basic Attack deals additional True DMG (up to 50% ATK) and every hit he throws IS a Basic Attack, so it fires across his whole counter stream (4-6 times/turn). 3 adds on-Crit True DMG and he crits constantly vs [Quash]; perfect mechanic plus anima ceiling.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Flat Basic Attack DMG (+10-30%) directly multiplies his Divine Spear Verdict spam. A -> S at 3 where Basic Attack gains +5-15% Crit Rate, which compounds with his guaranteed-crit [Quash] engine.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Each attack/Basic Attack stacks Final DMG; his many counters per turn ramp it to the 32-50% cap fast, and Final DMG multiplies every hit. anima magnitude, basic-atk tagged, ideal for a multi-hit counter hero.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks deal additional %-ATK True DMG (up to 20%), unconditional, firing on every counter and basic hit. True DMG also bypasses tanky targets; pure, reliable damage on his volume kit from 0.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate AND Crit DMG (+5-15% each). He already forces crits via +30% Crit Rate vs [Quash], so added Crit DMG converts directly into damage on every hit; 3 adds an on-crit buff-dispel. Best raw crit mirror.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12-30% Final DMG, no conditions, multiplies every counter, basic attack and Feat hit. The best generic damage multiplier in the pool and it works from 0 stars.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: DMG ramps when repeatedly attacking the same enemy within a turn (up to 42-60%). His Divine Spear Verdict counters and Feat double-hit pound the same target repeatedly, so it stacks well; pure multiplicative damage.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +ATK DMG (up to 20%) vs enemies with any Debuff. He self-applies [Quash] and [Holy Seal] on nearly every target, so this generic-debuff gate is almost always live; large, low-condition physical amp.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Big front-loaded Final DMG that RESETS on kill. He kills frequently and his on-kill chain (own mirror) helps reset uptime, so the bonus stays high through fights; strong on a kill-heavy attacker.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Flat Crit DMG%. He crits reliably via [Quash], so every point of Crit DMG is realized; cheap epic but pure synergy with his guaranteed-crit engine. Second-string crit behind Alucard.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG after each attack; his many attacks/turn ramp it fast. Even at 3+ where Basic Attack gives the smaller per-hit value, his sheer hit count (counters x5) keeps it near cap; reliable ramp damage.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Flat Crit Rate%. He wants to crit on every hit and only the +30% vs [Quash] is guaranteed; extra base Crit Rate helps first hits and off-[Quash] targets. Small epic numbers keep it just under Alucard/Aelia.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore (+5-15%) raises his physical counter/basic-attack damage vs tanky targets. A real but flat gain that does nothing for his True-DMG riders; solid bench filler.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG per Buff on self (up to 30%). His [Momentum] ramp and other self-buffs give him several stacks, so it scales decently; pure damage, dependent on buff count.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Flat single-target ATK DMG (+8-20%). His Divine Spear Verdict and Feat are single-target hits, so it applies, but it does nothing for off-target counter spread; good when he focuses one enemy.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Plain Final DMG% (+2-5%). A universally useful multiplier on his every hit, but small epic numbers; reliable filler behind Firmament/Wasteward.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK%. His [Quash] bonus (25% ATK x stacks), Lifesteal and True-DMG riders all scale off ATK, so ATK% touches nearly everything he does; small numbers keep it filler.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-attack DMG scaling with target's lost HP (up to 35%). His Divine Spear Verdict is a single attack and he grinds targets down over many counters, so the bonus grows; narrow to single hits only.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG + bonus vs [Shield] enemies. The base Final DMG always helps every hit; the shield clause is situational. Reasonable damage filler.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG up. His Ultimate is a passive (Divine Spear Verdict counter), not a scalable active nuke, so a flat Ultimate-DMG buff has little/no application to his basic-attack stream; off-fit.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-DMG boost that builds via Basic Attacks. He basic-attacks a lot (so it would build), but his Ultimate is a passive counter, not a discrete cast it can amplify; the basic-atk half is wasted on a payoff he can't use.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Small Final DMG (+5-15%) plus [Lethal] revive-block. The Final DMG portion helps every hit, but it is modest and the control rider is niche; usable filler, not a damage core.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AoE-skill True DMG, split among targets, capped per target. He has no real AoE attack skill (his kit is single-target counters + Feat), so the trigger rarely matches; mostly dead despite the True-DMG theme.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: Area-attack DMG only. His damage is single-target Divine Spear Verdict + Feat, so an AoE-only buff finds little to amplify; low-priority.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: %-current-HP True DMG vs targets with [DMG Over Time]. He applies [Quash]/[Holy Seal], not a DoT, so the generic-DoT gate is rarely satisfied by his own kit; only good with a DoT teammate.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Extra True DMG on Feat-Skill crit. His Feat (Judgment Blow) crits vs [Quash], so it triggers, but only on that one cooldown skill, not his counter stream; narrow True-DMG slice.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + crit stacks that build only when he does NOT kill. Anti-synergistic with a kill-heavy counter hero (his own mirror chains on kills); the base Final DMG is the only reliable part.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: On ally death: heal + big Crit Rate + Final DMG burst. He profits from crit/Final DMG and heal, but it needs an ally to die to fire; conditional and out of his hands.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Big True DMG gated on the target having [Infect], which he never applies. Dead without an Infect teammate, hence C despite the True-DMG theme (named-[Infect] gate, not a generic debuff).

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG, big only vs Damage-Share/Transfer targets which he never creates; the unconditional +5-20% Final DMG portion still helps every hit, so it scrapes into C as flat damage filler.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG only on passively-triggered AoE skills. His passive procs (Divine Spear Verdict) are single-target counters, not AoE, so the gate misfires; theme fits but trigger doesn't.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP + Healing-Received when low HP. His [Momentum] Lifesteal gives heal-amp slight synergy when low, but it is defensive with no offense; bench at best.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP + DMG when his HP is higher than enemy's. He fights at the front and takes hits to counter, so the condition is inconsistent; the DMG clause is small and it's a def mirror, so C.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Final DMG RED scaling as HP is lost. He often takes damage at the front, so the offensive half can turn on, but numbers are small and it is a def mirror; modest.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Pure Final DMG RED. He is a front counterattacker so a little survivability isn't useless, but it adds zero offense; he'd rather slot damage.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK and DEF only while carrying a [Shield] (heal at 3). He has no self-shield in his kit, so it usually sits inactive; the ATK part is wasted without a shield enabler.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP + AoE True DMG on a lethal hit. His Lifesteal/ramp keeps him alive and he rarely takes a clean lethal hit, so the retaliation seldom fires; mostly a stat stick for him.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Pure Final DMG RED (anima). Strong survivability but offers nothing to his offense; only if he must survive a specific spike at the front.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Excess-DMG reduction. Defensive only; keeps him alive to keep countering but adds no damage and competes with offensive slots.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED on being hit. He is attacked often (good trigger), but it is purely defensive with no offense; off his damage plan.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP%. Pure survivability with no damage; a front counter-DPS would rather run offense in every slot.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Flat HP% (epic) - same as Albert but weaker; bench survivability only.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF%. Minimal value on a low-DEF Assassin who wins by attacking; no offense.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counter True DMG scaling off DEF. He does get attacked and counter, but he has almost no DEF (def 93), so the DEF-scaled True DMG is tiny; tag fits, numbers don't.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG that scales with HP lost ([Time Seal] per 20-10% HP lost), and the 10-stack %-max-HP execute also needs heavy self-damage. He has no HP-loss engine and sustains via Lifesteal, so the stacks barely build and the execute rarely arms; off-engine despite the True-DMG tag.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED. Defensive anti-crit utility; gives him no offense.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED (legendary). Defensive only; off-role for his damage plan.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Reflects [Bleed] when attacked. He is attacked at the front, but a chance-to-Bleed reflect adds trivial damage and no synergy with his physical crit kit; near-dead.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Reflects [Infect] when attacked. Control/tank mirror with no offense for him and an [Infect] he never wants; weak.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +DMG vs enemies with Control. He applies no Control himself ([Quash]/[Holy Seal] are not control), so it only works behind a CC ally; conditional and off-kit.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: On Crit, reduce target Healing-Received. He crits, so it triggers, but it is a control/debuff with no damage payoff for him; situational utility only.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG meaningful mainly in Damage-Share state, which he never enters; the unconditional portion is small and the rest is anti-control utility; mostly dead for him.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: DMG-RED/heal tank mirror keyed to Damage-Share - a guard kit he has nothing to do with; defensive and off-plan.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate. His damage doesn't hinge on accuracy investment and he lands no high-value debuffs needing it; inert stat for him.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate. Pure defensive anti-CC stat, zero offense; dead slot for a damage counter-hero.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate buff. Survivability/anti-control only; contributes nothing to his damage.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + minor heal on buff expiry. Defensive utility with no damage; off-role.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Effect-Hit/[Fox Fire] control package. He isn't a debuff-control hero, so the engine never builds; wrong toolkit.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Extra [Bleed] on applying Bleed. He applies no Bleed, so it literally never triggers.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Extra [Infect] on applying Infect. He applies no Infect; dead trigger (named-status gate).

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Single-skill True DMG per Debuff on target, but the gate wants stacked debuffs he doesn't pile on, and it only fires on one skill; scaling stays near zero, F for him.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal output. He is not a healer; the effect does nothing for his counter-DPS.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal-skill amp. He has no heal skill to amplify; fully wasted.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Recover lost HP at turn start. Pure sustain with no offense; his own [Momentum] Lifesteal already heals him, so this is redundant and damage-dead.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Revive on death. Pure survival utility with no damage; off-plan for a front DPS who sustains via Lifesteal.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Team Shield at battle start. A support effect with no personal damage; off-role for his counter-DPS.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Grants allies Spirit Shield on his death. Pure support payoff that requires him to die; nothing for his own damage.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-RED support mirror with no offensive text at all; defensive filler, dead for a damage hero.
